The '''''Peacebringer''''' was, in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the new [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] for the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]] and the seat of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ratobo]]'s command. She was lost with all hands to [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] armed with long range [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] in the beginning stages of the [[Second Battle of Balmorra]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
